title: About FileUni
subtitle: View the current version, official resources, and the latest release status.
description: FileUni is a unified file platform for multi-protocol and multi-surface workflows. It brings together the Web UI, desktop GUI, and backend service capabilities so storage, accounts, services, and extensions stay in one operational workspace.
updateSectionDescription: Check the latest release for the current runtime target and jump directly to the best download when an update is available.
